definitions: The capital city of New Zealand, located at the southern tip of the North Island.
A city in Kansas, United States, and the county seat of Sumner County.
A city in Florida, United States, located in Palm Beach County.
A type of waterproof boot, typically made of rubber or PVC, named after Arthur Wellesley, 1st Duke of Wellington.
Arthur Wellesley, 1st Duke of Wellington, a British soldier and statesman, famous for defeating Napoleon at the Battle of Waterloo.
examples: Wellington is known for its vibrant arts scene.
She bought a new pair of Wellingtons for the rainy weather.
The Duke of Wellington was a key figure in British history.
